personal.name: Ankit Kumar Sharma
personal.title: Platform & DevOps Architect
personal.tagline: Platform Architect with 12+ years of expertise across DevOps, Cloud, and Databricks Lakehouse — engineering secure, automated, and high-performance platforms.

summary: Platform Architect specializing in secure, scalable, and high-performance cloud and data platforms across AWS, Azure, and Databricks Lakehouse. Expertise in Terraform-based IaC, Kubernetes, and DevOps practices, building standardized, multi-tenant platforms governed through AWS Control Tower and Unity Catalog. Driven by reliability and efficiency, I apply SRE principles and observability using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, and Databricks AI/BI dashboards—achieving ~30-35% cloud cost optimization and reducing MTTR by up to 50%. Proven in leading platform transformations and delivering resilient architectures with robust backup and disaster recovery strategies ensuring high availability and business continuity.

responsibilities: Architected and maintained the core platform across Databricks, AWS, and Azure using Terraform IaC—enabling standardized, reusable infrastructure for DE/DS/ML/BI teams.
Built self-service platform capabilities accelerating data product delivery and reducing time-to-market by ~80%.
Developed reusable CI/CD ecosystems with Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins (shared libraries), standardizing deployments across teams.
Led migration of governance for 300+ data products to Unity Catalog—establishing centralized governance, fine-grained access control, and serverless enablement.
Engineered auto-remediation (Sentinel utility) for Databricks ETL pipelines, reducing incidents and resolution time by ~75%.
Designed cost observability and optimization strategies across S3 and compute workloads, achieving ~80% platform cost reduction.
Strengthened platform reliability and security through multi-account AWS governance (Control Tower, SCPs), vulnerability automation, and scalable network architecture (Cloud WAN).
Deployed and managed cloud-native 5G platforms using Kubernetes, Docker, and Ansible—ensuring high availability and scalable infrastructure.
Automated end-to-end provisioning with 10+ Ansible playbooks, reducing manual effort by ~40% and configuration errors by ~80%.
Built CI/CD and deployment workflows for hybrid (on-prem + cloud) environments, improving release consistency and speed.
Designed observability solutions using Prometheus and Grafana, reducing incident detection time by ~60%.
Implemented centralized logging (ELK stack), reducing troubleshooting time from ~2 hours to ~25 minutes.
Engineered automated backup and recovery mechanisms for MySQL and platform components, ensuring reliable RPO/RTO compliance.
Performed advanced troubleshooting across Kubernetes, networking, and storage layers, improving platform stability and uptime.
Designed and optimized Helm charts for 25+ microservices, improving pod startup time by ~30% and deployment efficiency.
Built secure and lightweight Docker images (Alpine/Distroless), reducing image size by ~70% and minimizing critical vulnerabilities.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Git-based workflows, reducing deployment time from ~45 mins to ~20 mins (~55% improvement).
Increased deployment success rate from ~90% to ~98% through automated validation testing using Python (PyTest/UnitTest).
Implemented distributed storage solutions (Rook, GlusterFS) with dynamic provisioning, improving I/O performance by ~25%.
Integrated service mesh (Istio) enabling secure service-to-service communication, traffic management, and observability across microservices.
Established centralized logging and monitoring (EFK stack), improving system visibility and significantly reducing debugging time.
Built secure and lightweight Docker images (Alpine/Distroless), reducing image size by ~70% and minimizing critical vulnerabilities.
Designed and implemented observability solutions using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK/EFK stacks—reducing MTTD by ~50% and improving incident response.
Automated infrastructure provisioning and configuration using Ansible and shell/Python scripting, enabling faster and repeatable environment setup.
Engineered proactive monitoring and alerting systems (Prometheus Alertmanager, CloudWatch), minimizing downtime and improving system reliability.
Led root cause analysis for production incidents across distributed systems (compute, network, storage), reducing recurring failures and improving platform stability.
Developed reusable monitoring and deployment templates (monitoring-as-code, CI/CD patterns), standardizing operations across environments.
Optimized system performance and capacity through metric-driven scaling and resource tuning, improving overall platform efficiency.
Deployed and managed application platforms on AWS using Ansible and Python.
Provided operational support for application platforms and Linux-based systems.
Managed vulnerability patching and security updates for Linux servers.
Monitored logs using Splunk and rsyslog, and built basic automation solutions for log handling.
Supported multiple enterprise customers for Linux servers and Cisco NOS applications.
Deployed and maintained Cisco CSPC application on customer environments.
Developed automation scripts using Python and Bash.
Managed Linux infrastructure supporting enterprise workloads.
Implemented monitoring solutions improving operational visibility.
